questions.question: A construction company mixes $2$ parts of cement with $3$ parts of sand to make concrete. If they need $50$ bags of concrete, how many bags of cement will they need?
A chef mixes $1$ part of sugar with $2$ parts of flour to make a cake. If she has $12$ cups of sugar, how many cups of flour will she need?
A builder mixes $3$ parts of water with $1$ part of paint to make a paint mixture. If he needs $14$ gallons of paint mixture, how many gallons of water will he need?
A recipe calls for a mixture of $1$ part of oil with $4$ parts of vinegar. If $5$ cups of oil are needed, how many cups of vinegar are required?
A construction site needs a mixture of $2$ parts of gravel with $1$ part of cement. If $30$ tons of gravel are available, how many tons of cement will they need?
A chef makes a spice blend using $3$ parts of salt and $2$ parts of pepper. If $24$ cups of salt are needed, how many cups of pepper will be required?
A builder needs to mix $1$ part of glue with $5$ parts of water. If $6$ gallons of glue are needed, how many gallons of water will they require?
A chef mixes $4$ parts of water with $1$ part of food coloring. If $8$ cups of water are needed, how many cups of food coloring will they need?

A construction company needs to make a mixture of $2$ parts of sand and $1$ part of cement. If they have $18$ bags of cement, how many bags of sand do they need to make the mixture? Show your work and check your units.

A chef needs to make $50$ pounds of a spice blend using $3$ parts of paprika and $2$ parts of garlic powder. If they have $20$ pounds of paprika, how many pounds of garlic powder do they need? Show your work and check your units.

teacher_rules: Use the space provided to show your work
